items.headline: Gillman Barracks to Become a New Housing Estate, With 25 Heritage Buildings Preserved
items.summary: The former military camp at Gillman Barracks in the south will be redeveloped into a residential estate. Plans confirm that 25 heritage buildings and 8 hectares of greenery will be kept within the new precinct.
items.meaning: A brand-new estate is coming to a heritage-rich location near Alexandra, which could open up buying options in a stretch of Singapore that has had very little new residential supply.
items.headline_zh: Gillman Barracks将辟为新住宅区，25座历史建筑获保留
items.summary_zh: 南部旧军营Gillman Barracks将被重新开发成住宅区。规划已确认，新地段内将保留25座历史建筑及8公顷绿地。
items.meaning_zh: 一个全新住宅区即将落户历史底蕴深厚的亚历山大一带，这将为本已鲜有新住宅供应的这片区域带来新的购房选择。

items.headline: Smaller Condo Developments in Singapore Often Score Lower for Build Quality
items.summary: An analysis of construction quality assessments found that smaller condo projects tend to rate worse than larger ones, most likely because bigger developments benefit from economies of scale in site supervision and materials procurement.
items.meaning: If you are drawn to a small boutique condo, check the developer's track record and any available quality scores before you commit, because project size appears to affect build standards in a real way.
items.headline_zh: 新加坡较小型condo发展项目往往建筑质量评分偏低
items.summary_zh: 一项建筑质量评估分析发现，规模较小的condo项目评分往往不如大型项目，原因很可能是大型发展项目在工地监督和建材采购方面能享有规模效益。
items.meaning_zh: 如果你对小型精品condo感兴趣，下决定前记得先查清楚发展商的过往记录和现有质量评分，因为项目规模确实会对建筑标准造成实质影响。

items.headline: Two-Thirds of Maju Forest to Be Cleared for New HDB Estate in Clementi
items.summary: The government has confirmed that roughly two-thirds of Maju Forest in Clementi will be cleared to make way for a new public housing estate, while the remaining forested area will be retained.
items.meaning: Clementi will gain a significant batch of new HDB flats, giving future buyers another well-connected western town option, though the loss of most of the forest is a real trade-off for people who live nearby now.
items.headline_zh: 约三分之二的Maju Forest将被清除，为金文泰新HDB住宅区让路
items.summary_zh: 政府已确认，金文泰Maju Forest约三分之二的林地将被清除，以兴建新组屋住宅区，其余林地则会保留。
items.meaning_zh: 金文泰将迎来一批新HDB组屋，为未来买家提供另一个交通便利的西部市镇选择，但大部分森林的消失对目前住在附近的居民来说，确实是需要权衡的代价。

items.headline: Dunearn House Launches in Bukit Timah Turf City From $1.475M, First Condo in the Transformation
items.summary: Frasers Property has launched Dunearn House, the first private condo to emerge from the long-awaited Bukit Timah Turf City redevelopment, with prices starting at $1.475M for smaller units and a jump of about $1.1M to reach a 3-bedroom flat.
items.meaning: Buyers watching Turf City can now see actual prices for the first time, but the steep step-up between unit sizes means you need to be clear on your budget before you fall for a larger layout.
items.headline_zh: Dunearn House在武吉知马Turf City推出，起价$1.475M，为此地段转型首个condo
items.summary_zh: Frasers Property推出Dunearn House，这是备受期待的武吉知马Turf City重新发展计划中首个私人condo，小型单位起价$1.475M，而3卧室单位则需再多付约$1.1M。
items.meaning_zh: 一直关注Turf City的买家现在可以首次看到实际价格，但不同单位规格之间的价差相当悬殊，因此在爱上一个更大户型之前，务必先把预算想清楚。

items.headline: Tampines Executive HDB Flat Sold for $1.24M, a New Town Record
items.summary: A 31-year-old executive HDB flat in Tampines changed hands for $1.24 million, making it the highest resale price ever recorded for an HDB flat in that town.
items.meaning: Even older executive flats in mature towns keep hitting new highs, so if you own one in Tampines, your flat may be worth more than you expect.
items.headline_zh: 淡滨尼行政组屋以$1.24M成交，创全镇最高转售纪录
items.summary_zh: 一个已有31年楼龄的淡滨尼行政HDB组屋以$1.24M易手，成为该镇有史以来最高的HDB转售成交价。
items.meaning_zh: 成熟市镇里楼龄较高的行政组屋依然不断创出新高，如果你在淡滨尼拥有一套行政组屋，它的价值或许比你想象的还要高。
items.stat_label_zh: 淡滨尼HDB转售全镇最高纪录

items.headline: Five of the Cheapest 4-Bedroom Condos Available Now, Some Under $2M
items.summary: A roundup identifies five of the most affordable 4-bedroom condo options on the Singapore market today, with some units available for less than $2 million.
items.meaning: Families who need four bedrooms in a condo do not always have to spend $3M or more, and knowing which areas offer value can save you a significant amount.
items.headline_zh: 目前新加坡最实惠的五个4卧室condo，部分不足$2M
items.summary_zh: 一份盘点列出了目前新加坡市场上最实惠的五个4卧室condo选项，部分单位售价低于$2M。
items.meaning_zh: 需要4间卧室的家庭不一定非得花$3M或以上，了解哪些地区更具价值潜力，可以帮你省下一大笔钱。

items.headline: First Recorded 5-Room Resale at Dawson HDB Transacts at $1.39M
items.summary: A 5-room flat at the popular Dawson estate in Queenstown sold for $1.39 million, marking the first time a 5-room unit there has been recorded at that price level.
items.meaning: Dawson flats remain among the most sought-after HDB addresses in Singapore, and prices there show no sign of softening for well-designed public housing close to the city.
items.headline_zh: Dawson HDB首个有记录的5房式转售单位以$1.39M成交
items.summary_zh: 女皇镇人气住宅区Dawson一个5房式组屋以$1.39M售出，这是该处5房式单位首次录得这一价格水平。
items.meaning_zh: Dawson的组屋始终是新加坡最受追捧的HDB地址之一，靠近市区、设计精良的公共组屋价格丝毫没有走软的迹象。

items.headline: A 25-Year-Old Condo in the West Delivered the Highest 2-Bedroom Profits, Averaging $529,000 a Unit
items.summary: Data shows that a 25-year-old condo in western Singapore held on a 999-year lease has produced the highest average resale profit for 2-bedroom units, with sellers netting around $529,000 per transaction.
items.meaning: Long-tenure properties in established areas can still deliver strong gains decades on, which is worth factoring in when you are weighing freehold or near-freehold against a shorter lease at the point of purchase.
items.headline_zh: 西部一个25年楼龄condo创2卧室单位最高利润，平均每单元获利$529,000
items.summary_zh: 数据显示，新加坡西部一个楼龄25年、持有999年地契的condo，在2卧室单位平均转售利润上位居榜首，卖家每次交易平均净赚约$529,000。
items.meaning_zh: 地契年限长、位于成熟地区的物业，即使过了数十年仍可带来可观的升值空间，这在你权衡永久地契或接近永久地契与较短地契时，是一个值得认真考量的因素。
items.stat_label_zh: 每个2卧室单位平均利润
